title: Carrot Cake Bircher Muesli
summary: Carrot cake for breakfast? You bet. We've thrown all the flavours of your favourite cake into this healthy, high-fibre bircher muesli recipe. Tuck in.

method.description: Finely chop the walnuts and pecans, finely zest the orange, and coarsely grate the carrots. Add them into a bowl with the chia seeds, oats and hemp seeds.
In a jug, whisk together the water and yoghurt until smooth, then stir in the juice of the orange. Season with a pinch of salt and honey to taste.

Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and mix well. Divide between jars or containers, cover, and chill for at least 4 hours or overnight, until the oats and chia have soaked up the liquid.

To make the seed topping, toast the mixed seeds and sesame seeds in a dry frying pan over a medium heat for 3–4 mins, or until golden and popping. Remove from the heat and stir in the mixed spice, a touch of salt, and honey. Spread onto a plate to cool, then store in an airtight container at room temperature.
When ready to serve, top each portion of muesli with a dollop of Greek yoghurt and a generous sprinkle of spiced seed crunch.

tips: Yoghurt: Swap for coconut or oat yoghurt to make it vegan.
Nuts: Use any nuts you have – almonds or hazelnuts also work well.
Sweetener: Maple syrup or agave are great alternatives to honey.
Oats: Use gluten-free oats if required.
Make the base up to 4 days in advance and store in the fridge.
Keep the spiced seed mix in a jar at room temperature for up to 2 weeks.
Great for grab-and-go breakfasts – portion into jars or tubs for easy weekday meals

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
